name: check_availability
description: Query free/busy information for one or more users over a time range. Returns busy blocks and available slots for scheduling.

parameters.name: users
parameters.description: Email addresses to check availability for

parameters.name: calendar_ids
parameters.description: Specific calendar IDs to check (defaults to primary for each user)

parameters.name: slot_duration_minutes
parameters.description: Minimum slot duration in minutes for available blocks

name: create_event
description: Create a calendar event with title, time, location, attendees, and recurrence. Supports Google Calendar and Outlook-compatible fields.

parameters.name: all_day
parameters.description: Whether this is an all-day event

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Event location (address or virtual meeting URL)

name: delete_event
description: Cancel or delete a calendar event. For recurring events, choose whether to delete a single instance, this and following, or all instances.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: For recurring events: delete single instance, this and all following, or all instances

parameters.name: send_updates
parameters.description: Who to notify about the cancellation

parameters.name: cancellation_message
parameters.description: Optional message to include in cancellation notification

name: list_events
description: List calendar events within a date/time range. Supports filtering by calendar, status, and search query. Returns events sorted by start time.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query for event titles and descriptions

parameters.name: single_events
parameters.description: Expand recurring events into individual instances

name: update_event
description: Modify an existing calendar event. Update title, time, location, attendees, or description. Supports updating a single instance of a recurring event.

parameters.name: attendees
parameters.description: Replacement attendee list (full replace, not merge)

parameters.name: send_updates
parameters.description: Who to notify about the update

name: crm_company_manage
description: Create, read, update, list, and deactivate companies (customers, vendors, or both).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the company record.

name: crm_contact_export
description: Export contacts in CSV or JSON format.

name: crm_contact_manage
description: Create, read, update, list, and deactivate contacts.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the contact record.

name: crm_contact_merge
description: Merge duplicate contacts by absorbing a secondary contact into a primary contact.

parameters.name: primary_id
parameters.description: UUID of the contact to keep.

parameters.name: secondary_id
parameters.description: UUID of the contact to merge and deactivate.

name: crm_contact_search
description: Full-text search across contacts.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

name: doc_generate
description: Render a document from a template with variable substitution.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the template to render.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Key-value pairs to substitute into the template.

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output format for the rendered document.

name: doc_ocr_scan
description: Extract text from images using OCR.

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: URL of the image to scan.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Local file path to the image.

name: doc_receipt_process
description: Parse and extract structured data from a receipt via OCR text or image.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Raw OCR text of the receipt.

name: doc_search
description: Search documents by name, type, and date range.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter documents up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

name: doc_template_manage
description: Create, read, update, list, and deactivate document templates.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the template.

parameters.name: variables_schema
parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the template variables.

name: doc_version_history
description: Retrieve the version history of a document.

name: draft_email
description: Create, update, list, get, send, or delete email drafts. Drafts can be composed incrementally and sent when ready.

name: manage_labels
description: Create, list, update, delete email labels, and apply or remove labels from messages. Supports nested labels via parent_id.

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Parent label ID for nested labels

parameters.name: message_ids
parameters.description: Message IDs to apply/remove labels from (required for apply/remove)

parameters.name: label_names
parameters.description: Label names to apply/remove (required for apply/remove)

name: read_email
description: Read emails from inbox or a specific message by ID. Returns subject, sender, recipients, body, attachments metadata, and labels.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Mailbox folder to read from (for list)

parameters.name: unread_only
parameters.description: Filter to unread messages only (for list)

parameters.name: include_body
parameters.description: Include full message body in response

name: search_email
description: Search emails by query string, sender, labels, date range, or attachment presence. Uses Gmail-compatible search syntax.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (Gmail search syntax, e.g. 'from:alice subject:invoice has:attachment')

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter by sender email address or name

parameters.name: include_body
parameters.description: Include full message body in results

name: send_email
description: Compose and send an email via Gmail or compatible SMTP provider. Supports TO, CC, BCC recipients, HTML or plain-text body, attachments, and reply threading via in_reply_to.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Email body content (plain text or HTML depending on content_type)

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Body content type: plain text or HTML

parameters.name: in_reply_to
parameters.description: Message-ID to reply to (threads the conversation)

name: fin_balance_sheet
description: Generate a balance sheet report as of a given date, grouping accounts by type (assets, liabilities, equity). Optionally compare against a second date.

parameters.name: comparison_date
parameters.description: Optional comparison date for period-over-period view

name: fin_bank_reconcile
description: Import bank transactions, list unreconciled items, match to journal entries, and mark as reconciled.

parameters.name: journal_entry_id
parameters.description: Journal entry UUID to match against

name: fin_bill_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, receive, or void supplier bills. Mirrors invoice management on the payable side.

name: fin_budget_manage
description: Create budgets, add account lines, list budgets, and compare budgeted vs actual amounts from journal entries.

name: fin_chart_of_accounts
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, or deactivate general ledger accounts. Supports hierarchical accounts via parent_id and filtering by account type.

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Parent account UUID for hierarchical accounts

name: fin_credit_note
description: Create, retrieve, or list credit and debit notes against invoices or bills.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: Invoice UUID to apply note against

parameters.name: bill_id
parameters.description: Bill UUID to apply note against

name: fin_invoice_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, send, or void customer invoices. Auto-generates invoice numbers and calculates subtotals, tax, and totals from line items.

name: fin_journal_entry
description: Create, retrieve, list, post, or reverse double-entry journal entries. Validates that total debits equal total credits before insert.

name: fin_payment_record
description: Record received or made payments with optional allocation to invoices or bills.

parameters.name: allocated_to
parameters.description: Payment allocation to invoices or bills

name: fin_quotation_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, send, accept, reject, or convert quotations to invoices. Linking converted_invoice_id on conversion.

name: hr_attendance_log
description: Clock employees in/out, retrieve attendance records, and generate monthly summaries with hours and overtime.

name: hr_contract_manage
description: Create, retrieve, list, or terminate employee contracts including salary and pay frequency details.

name: hr_employee_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, or terminate employees with department and contact linking.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Contact UUID to link (required for create)

name: hr_expense_claim
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, submit, approve, reject, or reimburse employee expense claims.

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: Line items for the expense claim

name: hr_leave_manage
description: Request, approve, reject, or cancel leave requests, and query leave balances for employees.

parameters.name: leave_type
parameters.description: Type of leave (e.g. annual, sick, maternity)

name: hr_payroll_run
description: Create, calculate, approve, pay, get, or list payroll runs. Calculate computes gross, MPF, tax, and net for each active employee.

parameters.name: period_start
parameters.description: Pay period start date (YYYY-MM-DD), required for create

parameters.name: period_end
parameters.description: Pay period end date (YYYY-MM-DD), required for create

name: hr_payslip_generate
description: Generate text-based payslip summaries for a payroll run. Provide employee_id to generate for a single employee, or omit to generate for all.

parameters.name: employee_id
parameters.description: Employee UUID (optional; omit to generate for all employees)

name: ops_asset_manage
description: Fixed asset management including creation, lookup, disposal, and depreciation calculation.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the asset.

parameters.name: cost
parameters.description: Decimal string representing the purchase cost.

parameters.name: salvage_value
parameters.description: Decimal string representing the salvage value.

parameters.name: useful_life_months
parameters.description: Useful life of the asset in months.

name: ops_delivery_note
description: Create and manage delivery notes linked to shipments.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the delivery note.

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: Line items on the delivery note.

name: ops_reservation_availability
description: Query available reservation slots for a given resource type and date range.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Type of resource to check availability for.

name: ops_reservation_manage
description: Manage reservations including creation, updates, cancellation, completion, and no-show handling.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the reservation.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Filter reservations starting from this date.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter reservations up to this date.

name: ops_shipment_track
description: Shipment tracking with status updates, events, and item management.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the shipment.

name: ops_warehouse_manage
description: Warehouse CRUD operations and stock transfer between warehouses.

name: proc_bom_cost_calc
description: Calculate total BOM cost recursively

parameters.name: bom_id
parameters.description: BOM UUID to calculate cost for

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Number of units to cost (defaults to 1)

name: proc_bom_manage
description: Bill of Materials management with multi-level support

name: proc_goods_receive
description: Create or retrieve goods received notes

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The goods received operation to perform

name: proc_inventory_check
description: Check stock levels, warehouse contents, low stock report

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The inventory check operation to perform

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: Item UUID to check stock for

parameters.name: warehouse_id
parameters.description: Warehouse UUID to check contents of

name: proc_purchase_order
description: CRUD + send/receive/close/cancel purchase orders

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The purchase order operation to perform

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Current status of the purchase order

name: proc_reorder_manage
description: Manage reorder rules, trigger stock check

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The reorder rule operation to perform

parameters.name: min_level
parameters.description: Minimum stock level before reorder triggers

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Whether the reorder rule is active

name: proc_supplier_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, or deactivate suppliers

name: proc_supplier_quote
description: Create, retrieve, list, or compare supplier quotations

parameters.name: total
parameters.description: Total quoted amount as decimal string

parameters.name: quote_ids
parameters.description: List of quote UUIDs to compare (for compare action)

name: add_reaction
description: Add or remove an emoji reaction on a Slack message.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Whether to add or remove the reaction

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel ID where the message lives

name: create_thread
description: Reply to a message in a thread. Creates a threaded conversation under the specified parent message.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel ID where the parent message lives

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Timestamp of the parent message to reply to

parameters.name: blocks
parameters.description: Slack Block Kit blocks for rich formatting

parameters.name: reply_broadcast
parameters.description: Also post the reply to the channel

name: list_channels
description: List accessible Slack channels. Filter by type (public, private, DM, group DM) and membership status.

parameters.name: member_only
parameters.description: Only show channels the user is a member of

name: search_messages
description: Search Slack message history by query. Supports filtering by channel, user, date range, and sort order. Uses Slack search syntax.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (Slack search syntax, e.g. 'from:@alice in:#engineering has:link after:2026-01-01')

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter to a specific channel ID or name

parameters.name: from_user
parameters.description: Filter by sender user ID or display name

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by relevance or recency

name: send_message
description: Post a message to a Slack channel or direct message. Supports plain text, markdown (mrkdwn), Block Kit blocks, and thread replies.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel ID, channel name (e.g. '#general'), or user ID for DM

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Message text (markdown supported). Used as fallback when blocks are provided.

parameters.name: blocks
parameters.description: Slack Block Kit blocks for rich message formatting

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Timestamp of parent message to reply in thread

parameters.name: reply_broadcast
parameters.description: Also post threaded reply to the channel

parameters.name: as_user
parameters.description: Post as the authenticated user (vs. bot)

name: tax_calculate
description: Calculate tax for a period by querying financial data

parameters.name: tax_period_id
parameters.description: Tax period UUID to calculate for

name: tax_filing_prepare
description: Manage tax periods, prepare filing summaries, record submissions

parameters.name: period_start
parameters.description: Start date of the tax period (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: period_end
parameters.description: End date of the tax period (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Current status of the tax period

name: tax_rate_manage
description: Create, retrieve, update, list, or deactivate tax rates with jurisdiction support

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on tax rates

parameters.name: effective_from
parameters.description: Date the tax rate becomes effective (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Whether the tax rate is active

name: tax_report
description: Generate tax summaries, deductions reports, obligations overview

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The type of tax report to generate

parameters.name: tax_period_id
parameters.description: Tax period UUID to report on

parameters.name: period_start
parameters.description: Start date for the report range (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: period_end
parameters.description: End date for the report range (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: obligations_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of obligations to return

name: tax_withholding_track
description: Track WHT records, generate certificates

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The withholding tax operation to perform

parameters.name: tax_rate_id
parameters.description: Tax rate UUID applied for withholding

parameters.name: gross_amount
parameters.description: Gross payment amount as decimal string

parameters.name: wht_amount
parameters.description: Withholding tax amount as decimal string

name: wf_approval_action
description: Take an action (approve, reject, or request changes) on a pending approval.

parameters.name: actor_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the user taking the action.

name: wf_approval_status
description: Query approval records by ID, actor, document type, or status.

parameters.name: approval_id
parameters.description: Identifier of a specific approval record.

name: wf_approval_submit
description: Submit a document for approval routing.

parameters.name: document_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the document to submit.

name: wf_rule_manage
description: Manage approval routing rules including thresholds, approver chains, and auto-approve settings.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the rule.

parameters.name: document_type
parameters.description: Document type this rule applies to.

parameters.name: threshold_amount
parameters.description: Amount threshold that triggers this rule.

parameters.name: auto_approve_below
parameters.description: Automatically approve documents below this amount.
